channel.title: Kristian Uremovic — Blog
channel.description: CTF writeups, research notes, project writeups, and general writing.

item.title: URGENT/11: Mapping GCC Hardening Flags to VxWorks Zero-Days
item.description: Mapping compiler-level binary hardening flags to the URGENT/11 VxWorks zero-days and where they could have raised the cost of exploitation.

item.title: Relating Stuxnet to CERIAS Binary Hardening Research
item.description: What Stuxnet revealed about the security of embedded systems,

item.title: Hello, World
item.description: First post. Brief introduction to what this blog is for.

item.title: Zephyr RTOS + GCC Hardening: What's Actually Available
item.description: Documenting which GCC hardening flags are available on arm-zephyr-eabi-gcc SDK 0.17.0 and which are exposed through Zephyr Kconfig.

item.title: GCC Flag Simulations: Project Overview
item.description: An introduction to the gcc_flag_simulations repository — what it is, why it exists, and how it works.

item.title: PicoCTF 2025: Binary Exploitation Writeup
item.description: Walkthrough of a buffer overflow challenge using ret2libc technique with ASLR bypass.
